/* ============================================ PREMIUM COMPONENT STYLES ============================================ */ .premium-hero { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f8f9fc, #eef1ff); border-radius: 1.5rem; padding: 2.5rem; margin: 2rem 0; border: 1px solid #e0e4ff; } .premium-hero p { font-size: 1.05rem; } .hero-stats { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(120px, 1fr)); gap: 1rem; margin-top: 1.5rem; padding-top: 1.5rem; border-top: 1px solid #c7cdfe; } .hero-stat { text-align: center; } .hero-stat-num { display: block; font-size: 1.75rem; font-weight: 900; color: #4a3ac8; } .hero-stat-label { display: block; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 600; margin-top: 0.25rem; } /* Steps */ .steps-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr)); gap: 1.5rem; margin: 2rem 0; } .step-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 1rem; padding: 1.75rem; position: relative; transition: all 0.2s ease; } .step-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 12px 32px -8px rgba(74,58,200,0.18); border-color: #c7cdfe; } .step-number { width: 2.75rem; height: 2.75rem; border-radius: 50%; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #5849e4, #352c81); color: white; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-weight: 900; font-size: 1.1rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .step-title { font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 700; color: #1e293b; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .step-text { font-size: 0.9rem; color: #64748b; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0; } /* Testimonials */ .testimonials-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 1.5rem; margin: 2rem 0; } .testimonial-card { background: #f8f9fc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 1rem; padding: 1.75rem; } .quote-icon { margin-bottom: 0.75rem; } .testimonial-text { font-size: 0.9rem; color: #334155; line-height: 1.7; font-style: italic; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .testimonial-author { display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .testimonial-name { font-weight: 700; color: #1e293b; font-size: 0.875rem; } .testimonial-role { font-size: 0.75rem; color: #94a3b8; } /* FAQ */ .faq-list { margin: 1.5rem 0; } .faq-item { border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 0.75rem; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; padding: 0; overflow: hidden; } .faq-question { padding: 1.1rem 1.4rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1e293b; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; list-style: none; font-size: 0.9375rem; } .faq-question::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; } .faq-icon { transition: transform 0.2s ease; color: #4a3ac8; flex-shrink: 0; } .faq-item[open] .faq-icon { transform: rotate(180deg); } .faq-item[open] { border-color: #c7cdfe; } .faq-answer { padding: 0 1.4rem 1.1rem; color: #64748b; font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.7; } /* Checklist */ .checklist-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(240px, 1fr)); gap: 0.75rem; margin: 1.5rem 0; } .check-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.6rem; background: #f0fdf4; border: 1px solid #bbf7d0; border-radius: 0.6rem; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #166534; font-weight: 500; } /* CTA Banner */ .cta-banner { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4a3ac8, #352c81); border-radius: 1.25rem; padding: 2.25rem; text-align: center; margin: 2.5rem 0; } .cta-text { color: white; font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 1.25rem; } .cta-button { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; background: white; color: #4a3ac8; font-weight: 700; padding: 0.85rem 2rem; border-radius: 0.75rem; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.2s ease; } .cta-button:hover { background: #eef1ff; } /* Image figures */ .premium-figure { margin: 2rem 0; border-radius: 1rem; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; } .premium-figure img { width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 0; border-radius: 0; } /* ============================================ PREMIUM COMPONENT STYLES ============================================ */ .premium-hero { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f8f9fc, #eef1ff); border-radius: 1.5rem; padding: 2.5rem; margin: 2rem 0; border: 1px solid #e0e4ff; } .premium-hero p { font-size: 1.05rem; } .hero-stats { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(120px, 1fr)); gap: 1rem; margin-top: 1.5rem; padding-top: 1.5rem; border-top: 1px solid #c7cdfe; } .hero-stat { text-align: center; } .hero-stat-num { display: block; font-size: 1.75rem; font-weight: 900; color: #4a3ac8; } .hero-stat-label { display: block; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 600; margin-top: 0.25rem; } /* Steps */ .steps-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr)); gap: 1.5rem; margin: 2rem 0; } .step-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 1rem; padding: 1.75rem; position: relative; transition: all 0.2s ease; } .step-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 12px 32px -8px rgba(74,58,200,0.18); border-color: #c7cdfe; } .step-number { width: 2.75rem; height: 2.75rem; border-radius: 50%; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #5849e4, #352c81); color: white; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-weight: 900; font-size: 1.1rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .step-title { font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 700; color: #1e293b; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .step-text { font-size: 0.9rem; color: #64748b; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0; } /* Testimonials */ .testimonials-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 1.5rem; margin: 2rem 0; } .testimonial-card { background: #f8f9fc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 1rem; padding: 1.75rem; } .quote-icon { margin-bottom: 0.75rem; } .testimonial-text { font-size: 0.9rem; color: #334155; line-height: 1.7; font-style: italic; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .testimonial-author { display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .testimonial-name { font-weight: 700; color: #1e293b; font-size: 0.875rem; } .testimonial-role { font-size: 0.75rem; color: #94a3b8; } /* FAQ */ .faq-list { margin: 1.5rem 0; } .faq-item { border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 0.75rem; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; padding: 0; overflow: hidden; } .faq-question { padding: 1.1rem 1.4rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1e293b; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; list-style: none; font-size: 0.9375rem; } .faq-question::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; } .faq-icon { transition: transform 0.2s ease; color: #4a3ac8; flex-shrink: 0; } .faq-item[open] .faq-icon { transform: rotate(180deg); } .faq-item[open] { border-color: #c7cdfe; } .faq-answer { padding: 0 1.4rem 1.1rem; color: #64748b; font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.7; } /* Checklist */ .checklist-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(240px, 1fr)); gap: 0.75rem; margin: 1.5rem 0; } .check-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.6rem; background: #f0fdf4; border: 1px solid #bbf7d0; border-radius: 0.6rem; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #166534; font-weight: 500; } /* CTA Banner */ .cta-banner { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4a3ac8, #352c81); border-radius: 1.25rem; padding: 2.25rem; text-align: center; margin: 2.5rem 0; } .cta-text { color: white; font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 1.25rem; } .cta-button { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; background: white; color: #4a3ac8; font-weight: 700; padding: 0.85rem 2rem; border-radius: 0.75rem; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.2s ease; } .cta-button:hover { background: #eef1ff; } /* Image figures */ .premium-figure { margin: 2rem 0; border-radius: 1rem; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; } .premium-figure img { width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 0; border-radius: 0; }
